name: punchwall-radius-damage-shake
description: Validate body-direction radial punch damage falloff, no target lock when facing away, and replicated block vibration before destruction.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart root.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-40)) local r=c:Invoke("PunchRadius") local folder=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"] local affected,broken,surviving=0,0,0 local minScale,maxScale=1,0 for _,b in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do local scale=b:GetAttribute("LastRadiusDamageScale") or 0 if scale>0 then affected+=1 minScale=math.min(minScale,scale) maxScale=math.max(maxScale,scale) if b:GetAttribute("Broken") then broken+=1 elseif (b:GetAttribute("HP") or 0)<(b:GetAttribute("MaxHP") or 0) then surviving+=1 end end end local primary=folder:FindFirstChild(tostring(r.primary)) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,outcome=r.outcome,hitCount=r.hitCount,affected=affected,broken=broken,surviving=surviving,minScale=minScale,maxScale=maxScale,primaryBroken=primary and primary:GetAttribute("Broken"),score=r.Score})

steps.label: one body-directed punch damages a radius with falloff

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart root.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,0)) local r=c:Invoke("PunchRadius") return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,reason=r.reason,broken=r.BrokenDepthBlocks,score=r.Score})

steps.label: facing away causes no damage and proves no target lock

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=100,WallLevel=3,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart root.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-68),Vector3.new(-2,3,-90)) local r=c:Invoke("PunchRadius") local b=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"]:FindFirstChild(tostring(r.primary)) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,primary=r.primary,shakeToken=b and b:GetAttribute("ShakeToken"),lastShakeAt=b and b:GetAttribute("LastShakeAt"),survived=b and not b:GetAttribute("Broken"),hp=b and b:GetAttribute("HP"),maxHP=b and b:GetAttribute("MaxHP")})

steps.label: tough block starts vibration when damaged but not broken

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local name=p:GetAttribute("LastRadiusPrimary") local b=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"]:FindFirstChild(tostring(name)) local base=b and b:GetAttribute("BaseCFrame") return H:JSONEncode({exists=b~=nil,shaking=b and b:GetAttribute("Shaking"),restored=b and base and (b.CFrame.Position-base.Position).Magnitude<0.01})

steps.label: vibrating block returns to its exact grid position
